ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, synthetic) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the match (e.g., weather conditions, injuries) */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round in which the match is played */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the match (e.g., Q1, HT, Q3, FT) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match at the end of the quarter */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team at the end of the quarter */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team at the end of the quarter */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored in the quarter */,
  "behinds" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored in the quarter */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score (goals + behinds) at the end of the quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin of victory */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match went into overtime */,
  "crowd_score" INTEGER /* Score given by the crowd for the match (e.g., for entertainment value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player, analyst) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
